74834.subject: Here's what was missing each time
74834.body: Most builds stall at the same four points. :root { color-scheme: light only !important; } html { color-scheme: light only !important; } body, table, td, a { -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%; -ms-text-size-adjust: 100%; } table, td { mso-table-lspace: 0pt; mso-table-rspace: 0pt; border-collapse: separate; border-spacing: 0; } img { -ms-interpolation-mode: bicubic; border: 0; outline: none; text-decoration: none; display: block; } body { margin: 0 !important; padding: 0 !important; background-color: #f0ede6 !important; color-scheme: light only !important; } @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) { body, .bg-page { background-color: #f0ede6 !important; } .bg-white { background-color: #ffffff !important; } .bg-header { background-color: #000000 !important; } .bg-footer { background-color: #ffffff !important; } .text-heading { color: #111111 !important; } .text-body { color: #3A3835 !important; } .text-signoff { color: #3A3835 !important; } .text-foot-muted { color: #9AA19D !important; } .btn-bg { background-color: #055FFA !important; } .btn-text { color: #ffffff !important; } } u + .body .bg-page { background-color: #f0ede6 !important; } u + .body .bg-white { background-color: #ffffff !important; } u + .body .bg-header { background-color: #000000 !important; } u + .body .bg-footer { background-color: #ffffff !important; } u + .body .text-heading { color: #111111 !important; } u + .body .text-body { color: #3A3835 !important; } u + .body .text-signoff { color: #3A3835 !important; } u + .body .text-foot-muted { color: #9AA19D !important; } u + .body .btn-bg { background-color: #055FFA !important; } u + .body .btn-text { color: #ffffff !important; } [data-ogsc] .bg-white { background-color: #ffffff !important; } [data-ogsc] .bg-header { background-color: #000000 !important; } [data-ogsc] .text-heading { color: #111111 !important; } [data-ogsc] .text-body { color: #3A3835 !important; } [data-ogsc] .btn-bg { background-color: #055FFA !important; } [data-dark-mode] .bg-white { background-color: #ffffff !important; } [data-dark-mode] .bg-header { background-color: #000000 !important; } [data-dark-mode] .text-heading { color: #111111 !important; } [data-dark-mode] .text-body { color: #3A3835 !important; } [data-dark-mode] .btn-bg { background-color: #055FFA !important; } [data-dark-mode] .btn-text { color: #ffffff !important; } @media only screen and (max-width: 600px) { .em-outer-td { padding: 16px !important; background-color: #f0ede6 !important; } .em-card { width: 100% !important; max-width: 100% !important; border-radius: 11px !important; border-left: 1px solid #E8E6DF !important; border-right: 1px solid #E8E6DF !important; } .em-header-td { padding: 14px 20px !important; } .em-body-td { padding: 28px 20px 0 !important; } .em-closing-td { padding: 20px 20px 28px !important; } .em-footer-td { padding: 20px 20px 24px !important; border-radius: 0 0 10px 10px !important; } .em-footer-left { display: block !important; width: 100% !important; >>>>>>>> napísala(a):
>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>>> Dobry ,
>>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>>> Chcel by som sa spytat ci mate este volny termin na 26.07.2026, a
>>>>>>>>> ked Ano, ta potom mohli by sme zajtra stretnut?
>>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>>> вт, 19 трав. 2026 р. о 12:09 Posh Posh Weddings <info@poshposh.sk>
>>>>>>>>> пише:
>>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>>>> Zdravíme nevestu💍🤍,
>>>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>>>> Ďakujeme veľmi pekne za vašu správu.. Termín svadby máme ešte
>>>>>>>>>> voľný a veľmi radi budeme súčasťou vašej svadby.🤍
>>>>>>>>>>
>>>>>>>>>> Spravidla sa s klientami stretávame osobne v showroome v
>>>>>>>>>> Rozhanovciach (kúsok od Košíc) kde si spolu vieme vyskladať svadobnú
>>>>>>>>>> výzdobu a na základe toho vytvoriť cenovú ponuku na mieru pre vás ak by ste
>>>>>>>>>> mali záujem prosím navrhnite deň a čas kedy by vám to najviac vyhovovalo
>>>>>>>>>> aby sa časovo radi prispôsobíme vášmu času. Poprípade, ak sme mimo Košíc či
>>>>>>>>>> Prešova, radi si s Vami dohodneme videohovor. Prosím navrhnite deň a čas,
>>>>>>>>>> ktorý by Vám vyhovoval najviac, pokojne aj cez víkend aj vo večerných
>>>>>>>>>> hodinách. 🙂 Najbližsie voľne termíny máme ešte aj tento týždeň. Forme
>>>>>>>>>> stret

74515.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — June 14
74515.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-june-14-oleh-bezuhlyi-akqxf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3BmbZ4FC4IQ0mg0XDN2T%2BrWg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=3vrdyj7E8K3ck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mqe0o02q~q3-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mqe0o02q-q3
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: A July 1 MiCA cutoff looms for millions of EU crypto users while a DPRK-linked $36M hack and a UK naval seizure exposing USDT sanctions evasion show that crypto's geopolitical risk is no longer theoretical. 🚨 Millions of EU Crypto Users Face Exchange Cutoff as MiCA Deadline Hits in Days On July 1, 2026, the temporary operating permission that allowed crypto companies to serve EU customers while awaiting a full MiCA license expires — and exchanges, brokers, and wallet services that have not secured authorization must immediately cut off access to European users with no further grace period. CryptoSlate reports that the deadline creates a live operational crisis for ordinary investors who may lose access to their funds, positions, or platforms overnight, with little notice from providers scrambling to reach compliance. Read full story 💀 Humanity Protocol's $36M Hack Linked to Suspected North Korean Hackers Cybersecurity firm Quantstamp has attributed the $36 million breach of Humanity Protocol to suspected North Korean threat actors, identifying a fraudulent phishing email spoofing crypto exchange Bithumb as the attack's primary entry vector. The incident adds another eight-figure sum to the growing ledger of assets stolen by DPRK-affiliated hacking groups, which have systematically targeted blockchain projects to fund state programs operating under international sanctions. More details ⚖️ CFTC No-Action Letter Opens First Legal Path for Digital Commodity Perpetuals in the US The CFTC issued a staff no-action letter that clears a legal runway for perpetual futures contracts on digital commodities to operate within the United States — a product category that has until now existed almost exclusively at offshore venues to sidestep regulatory uncertainty. The guidance provides immediate operational clarity for US-domiciled exchanges and their institutional clients, who have long been unable to offer the perpetual swap structures that dominate global crypto derivatives volumes. Read more 📊 SEC Proposes Reg NMS Rule Changes That Could Reshape Tokenized Stock Trading The SEC has proposed rescinding Rules 611 and 610e of Regulation NMS — the order-protection and access rules that have governed US equity market structure for two decades — in a move with substantial downstream implications for how tokenized st
